description: MachinePool is the Schema for the machinepools API.

apiVersion.description: APIVersion defines the versioned schema of this representation of an object. Servers should convert recognized schemas to the latest internal value, and may reject unrecognized values.

kind.description: Kind is a string value representing the REST resource this object represents. Cannot be updated.

spec.description: MachinePoolSpec defines the desired state of MachinePool.

clusterName.description: ClusterName is the name of the Cluster this object belongs to.

failureDomains.description: FailureDomains is the list of failure domains this MachinePool should be attached to.

minReadySeconds.description: Minimum number of seconds for which a newly created machine pool node should be ready without any containers crashing.

providerIDList.description: ProviderIDList are the identification IDs of machine instances provided by the provider.

replicas.description: Number of desired machines. Defaults to 1.

template.description: Template describes the machines that will be created.

spec.description: Spec is the specification of the desired behavior of the machine.

bootstrap.description: Bootstrap is a reference to a local struct which encapsulates fields corresponding to each bootstrap provider.

configRef.description: ConfigRef is a reference to a bootstrap provider-specific resource that holds configuration details.

dataSecretName.description: DataSecretName is the name of the secret that stores the bootstrap data script. If nil, the Machine should remain in the Pending state.

clusterName.description: ClusterName is the name of the Cluster this object belongs to.

infrastructureRef.description: InfrastructureRef is a required reference to a custom resource offered by an infrastructure provider.

nodeDeletionTimeout.description: NodeDeletionTimeout defines how long the controller will attempt to delete the Node that the Machine hosts after the Machine is marked for deletion.

nodeDrainTimeout.description: NodeDrainTimeout is the total amount of time that the controller will spend on draining a node.

nodeVolumeDetachTimeout.description: NodeVolumeDetachTimeout is the total amount of time that the controller will spend on waiting for all volumes to be detached.

providerID.description: ProviderID is the identification ID of the machine provided by the provider.

version.description: Version defines the desired Kubernetes version.
